subject: A hulking creature on a vehicle aims a flame-thrower at a group of cat-like humanoid figures, engulfing them in fire
description: From the left side of the frame, a large grey-skinned brute with bared teeth and yellow eyes leans forward from a battered vehicle, gripping a hand-held flame-thrower with both hands. A jet of orange-yellow fire erupts from the muzzle and engulfs the right half of the composition, where two upright cat-like creatures with pointed ears, armored shoulders and striped torsos rear back in pain, claws raised. A third smaller cat figure crouches at the edge of the flame, and a thin gangly silhouette stands in the smoke at the right edge. The background is a hazy blue-grey wasteland sky with falling embers, the foreground a torrent of fire and twisted metal wreckage.
foreground: fire jet from a flame-thrower wielded by a grey-skinned attacker, with cat-folk figures caught in the blast
background: smoky blue-grey post-apocalyptic sky with drifting embers and faint debris
emotion: aggression on the attacker, pain and recoil on the cat-folk
